The best coaching, finally within reach.

We didn't want elite instruction locked behind expensive in-person camps. So we found the debaters who won this season — TOC, Glenbrooks, and NDCA champions — and put them online, where any serious LD debater can train with them.

You're placed in a lab with peers at your level, so every round, drill, and discussion actually fits where you are.

For Parents
Structured. Supervised. Online. Champ Camp runs on a clear daily schedule (11 AM–4:30 PM CST) with credentialed coaching staff present throughout every session. All coaches are verified competitive debaters with strong academic and competitive track records. We are happy to answer any questions before you enroll.

About the Program

Elite LD coaching, made accessible.

The debaters who won this season — online, in labs built around your skill level.

Why we built it

Top-tier coaching usually means expensive in-person camps. We thought that was backwards. So we brought together the debaters who won this season — TOC, Glenbrooks, and NDCA champions — and put them online, where any serious LD debater can train with them.

Labs by skill level

You're placed in a lab with peers at your level. Rounds, drills, and feedback all land because everyone in the room is fighting the same battles you are — not too far ahead, not behind.

How it works

Coaches teach their specialties — philosophy, theory, K, and policy — then run live practice rounds, stopping to correct in the moment. Session II runs August 9–15, fully online.

Who runs it

Co-founded by Om Modi (TOC Finalist, Glenbrooks Champion) and Atharva Srivastava (TOC Semifinalist, TFA State Champion), with curriculum by TOC Champion Bolang Zhu.
